message:
Remove unused std::time::Instant imports from E2E tests

With PhaseTracker consolidation into tests/util/e2e_log.rs, timing is
now handled by the shared tracker. The direct Instant imports in
e2e_error_recovery, e2e_large_dataset, and e2e_search_index are no
longer needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
